### REGIONAL_BANK Digital — Senior Product Manager (Mobile Banking)
*2021 – Present*

- Drove the redesign of the mobile account overview flow; 90-day user retention increased from 41% to 58% and daily active sessions per retained user rose ~1.4x over the six months following launch.
- Defined and launched a bill-pay reminder feature in partnership with 3 engineering squads and the compliance team; late-payment rate among enrolled users dropped by ~34% within the first quarter.
- Launched an in-app financial health score for 280k+ monthly active users; NPS among the feature's engaged segment outperformed the app-wide baseline by 18 points.
- Partnered with the data team to reduce experiment cycle time from 6 weeks to 3 weeks by standardizing metric event taxonomy, enabling the squad to double experiment throughput per half.

### ACME_CORP Marketplace — Product Manager (Seller Tools)
*2019 – 2021*

- Increased seller activation rate (listing within 7 days of sign-up) from 29% to 47% by simplifying the listing creation flow from 11 steps to 5.
- Reduced seller support ticket volume by ~22% by shipping a self-serve bulk-edit tool for inventory management, handling ~15k inventory updates per day at launch.
